author: Red Cogs
install_msg: Thanks for installing Tags! Create your first tag with `[p]tag add <name> <content>` or `/tag add`. Both prefix and slash commands are supported!
name: Tags
short: Custom command tags for your server
description: Create, edit, and manage custom text tags that act like server-specific commands. Supports prefix commands, slash commands, and variables like {user}, {guild}, {date}, etc.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores tag content, author IDs, and usage counts per guild. No personal data is shared with third parties.
